title: Nanoscience with Nanocrystals in 2025: A New Era of Biomedical Innovation and Precision Medicine
description: This article explores the transformative prospects of nanoscience with nanocrystals in 2025, highlighted by the 2023 Nobel Prize in Chemistry. It provides a comprehensive overview covering foundational breakthroughs in synthesis and surface chemistry, advanced applications in drug delivery and diagnostics, critical troubleshooting for safety and manufacturing, and the pivotal role of AI and comparative validation in translating laboratory innovations into clinical realities.
audience: researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
